title: Minecraft Overhauled
description: The Better Way to  play Minecraft
body:
**Dive into a completely revamped Minecraft experience with this modpack that takes both visuals and performance to the next level!**


**Advanced World Maps: **

Stay oriented with JourneyMap, offering real-time navigation, detailed maps, waypoints, and a built-in radar for mobs and structures.


**Improved Structures: **

Explore breathtaking new villages, awe-inspiring temples, and challenging dungeons with enhanced world generation. Each structure is designed to make your adventures even more thrilling.


**Performance Enhancements: **

Enjoy smoother gameplay, faster load times, and stable frame rates with mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Phosphor, even in the most resource-intensive biomes.


**Visual and Gameplay Upgrades: **

Immerse yourself in more detailed textures, realistic landscapes, and atmospheric effects, making every moment in your world feel alive.

**Compatibility and Stability: **
Designed for seamless integration, this modpack ensures smooth performance and high stability, perfect for both single-player and multiplayer sessions.
Whether you're exploring endless horizons or unleashing your creativity, Minecraft Overhauled promises to make every session unforgettable. Get ready for the ultimate Minecraft experience!
